variants.name: 纳吉尼
variants.ability: 你是魂器。每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：他中毒直到下个黄昏。如果你选择了纳威，他会得知此事。
variants.otherNightReminder: Choose who to poison. Potentially inform Neville he was chosen by Nagini (He is still poisoned)
variants.flavor: You know Voldemort's snake, Neville? He's got a huge snake... Calls it Nagini... It's got to be killed.
